steps.description: Credits-based will use the number of credits as a requisite for graduation. Term-based will limit the options for enrollment for each term.
steps.label: Enrollment Type
steps.title: Enrollment Type

steps.description: If Credits-based, this is the number of credits required for graduation, INCLUDING those in emphases. If terms-based, merely informational.
steps.label: Credits for completion
steps.title: Credits

steps.description: This will make this course mandatory for ALL enrolled students. There is a different setting for mandatory for a particular emphasis.
steps.label: Mandatory for this program
steps.title: Mandatory for this Program

steps.description: Allows student to register in more than one Course Schedule offered for this course (blocked otherwise). E.g., useful for "Individual Study"
steps.label: Allow more than once
steps.title: Allow more than once

steps.description: Pulled from course default value but overriden here. When a student enrolls on a course, this value will be used. Students from different programs can receive different number of credits for the same Course Schedule. This version does not contemplate different assignments per program.
steps.label: Credits for this program
steps.title: Credits for this program

steps.description: Credits required for this track are INCLUDED in the total credits for the program. They will be a distinct requirement for the program, as only courses for this track (below) will count towards this sub-total.
steps.label: Track Credits Required
steps.title: Track credits

steps.description: This section is in development, but you can test it. The idea is to have a structured documentation to publish catalogues and the website.
steps.label: Publish on web
steps.title: Publish on Web

steps.description: This is key for financial automation. Fee Categories declared here will be automatically triggered for students enrolled in this program according to the event to charge (this field is read-only as it merely brings the setting in Fee Category).
steps.label: Fee Category
steps.title: Fee Category
